Interface ISkillRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
SkillRepository
public interface ISkillRepository
Persistence contract for player skill data.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Map<String,Long>>
    loadAll(UUID uuid)
    Loads all skill XP values for a player.
    CompletableFuture<Long>
    loadOne(UUID uuid, String skillId)
    Loads the XP for a single skill.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    upsertXP(UUID uuid, String skillId, long xp)
    Persists a player's XP for a single skill.

  • Method Details

    • loadAll

      CompletableFuture<Map<String,Long>> loadAll(UUID uuid)
      Loads all skill XP values for a player.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of a map from skill ID to total XP

    • loadOne

      CompletableFuture<Long> loadOne(UUID uuid, String skillId)
      Loads the XP for a single skill. Returns 0 if no row exists yet.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      a future of the stored XP, or 0 if not found

    • upsertXP

      CompletableFuture<Void> upsertXP(UUID uuid, String skillId, long xp)
      Persists a player's XP for a single skill. Uses an upsert that keeps the higher of the stored and incoming value, so out-of-order async writes can never overwrite a newer result.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      skillId - the skill identifier
      xp - the new total XP
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write finishes
